creator: Taha
hook: A lot of founders ask me if buying more tools will fix a slow pipeline.
source_signal: Feed theme 2026-07-01: tool consolidation (Michel Lieben; Clay replacing the ZoomInfo/Clearbit/Lusha stack)
notes: Teaching post built on COPYWRITING-BIBLE.
